Legendary Drum Fill (9 Drama)
You start a drumroll that roars like thunder with every impact the heroes make.
[Area, Magic] Maneuver
Distance: 4 burst | Target: Self and each ally in the area
Effect: Each target gains 1 surge, then gains 1 surge at the start of each combat round until the end of the encounter.

features.name: Perk
features.description: You gain one interpersonal, lore, or supernatural perk of your choice.

features.name: Spotlight
features.description:
You have the following performance ability, which is usable with your Routines feature.
Spotlight
The audience is watching, so you'd better give them a show.
[Area, Magic, Performance] No action
Distance: 5 aura | Target: Self and each ally in the area
Effect: While this performance is active, each target who starts their turn in the area gains 1 of their Heroic Resource. This Heroic Resource disappears at the end of the target's turn if they don't spend it.

features.name: A Muse's Muse
features.description: At the start of each of your turns during combat, you gain 1d3 + 1 drama instead of 1d3.

features.name: Characteristic Increase
features.description: Each of your characteristic scores increases by 1, to a maximum of 4.

features.name: Equal Billing
features.description:
You can use your Scene Partner feature to form a bond with one willing hero instead of an NPC you interact with using a test. If you bond with another hero, you lose your existing bond with a hero.

Additionally, you and creatures you are bonded with gain a +1 bonus to saving throws. Whenever you or a bonded creature succeeds on a saving throw, you and each creature you are bonded with gains temporary Stamina equal to your level.

features.name: Skill
features.description: You gain one skill of your choice.

features.name: Crowd Favorites
features.description:
You have the following performance abilities, which are usable with your Routines feature.
Moonlight Sonata
Music pours out of your heart, filling the area with the utmost delicacy and without damper.
[Area, Magic, Performance] No action
Distance: 5 aura | Target: Each ally in the area
Effect: While this performance is active, each target who is dead can choose to continue taking turns after death. On each of their turns, a target can move and use either a main action or a maneuver, but can't spend Recoveries or use triggered actions. At the end of the encounter, each target who chose to take turns this way turns to dust and blows away.
Radical Fantasia
Viras, my Viras, will you hold their hands as they cryyy—aaaiigh?
[Area, Magic, Performance] No action
Distance: 5 aura | Target: Self and each ally in the area
Effect: While this performance is active, each target who starts their turn in the area ignores difficult terrain, and any ability they use that imposes forced movement gains a +2 bonus to the forced movement distance until the end of their turn. Additionally, once per combat round, each target can use a triggered action as a free triggered action.

features.name: Deleted Scene
features.description: Whenever a creature within distance of your Dramatic Monologue ability makes a power roll, you can spend 1 drama as a free triggered action to use Dramatic Monologue, targeting only one creature.

features.name: Masterwork
features.description:
Choose one of your signature abilities and name it after yourself. You always have this ability available, even if it is sourced from a kit you switch out. Whenever you use this ability, you gain an edge and 1 surge that you can use only on this ability.

Additionally, when your named signature ability is the last ability you use in an encounter, you can immediately use the Hear Ye, Hear Ye! effect of your Zeitgeist feature to tell tales of your exploits after the encounter ends.

features.name: Perk
features.description: You gain one perk of your choice.

features.name: 9th-Level Auteur Abilities
features.description:
Choose one of the following abilities.
Epic (11 Drama)
Your story tells a tale of the villain's waning power and how the heroes rose to the occasion to stop them.
[Magic, Melee, Ranged] Maneuver
Distance: Melee 1 or ranged 10 | Target: One creature
Power Roll + Presence:
- ≤11: The target takes a bane on ability rolls (save ends).
- 12-16: The target has a double bane on ability rolls (save ends).
- 17+: The target has a double bane on power rolls (save ends).
Effect: Choose one ally within distance. While the target is affected by this ability, each time they use an ability, that ally can make a free strike against them after the ability is resolved.
Rising Tension (11 Drama)
You narrate the tension of the scene and put all hope into your protagonist to turn things around.
[Magic, Ranged] Maneuver
Distance: Ranged 10 | Target: One ally
Effect: The target gains 3 of their Heroic Resource, has a double edge on a power roll of their choice made during their next turn, is no longer slowed or weakened if they were before, and can immediately take their turn after yours if they have not taken their turn already this round.

features.name: 9th-Level Duelist Abilities
features.description:
Choose one of the following abilities.
Expert Fencer (11 Drama)
If you can land the strike, the crowd goes wild.
[Charge, Melee, Strike, Weapon] Main action
Distance: Melee 3 | Target: One creature or object
Power Roll + Agility:
- ≤11: 15 + A damage
- 12-16: 21 + A damage
- 17+: 28 + A damage; M < STRONG, bleeding (save ends)
Effect: This ability can't obtain better than a tier 2 outcome unless the target is at maximum distance. If you obtain a tier 3 outcome with a natural 17 or higher, you gain 3 surges that you can use immediately.
Renegotiated Contract (11 Drama)
No, no. You don't die until the sequel.
[Melee, Strike, Weapon] Main action
Distance: Melee 1 | Target: One creature
Effect: Add your current Stamina to your target's current Stamina, then you have half that total Stamina and the target has the remainder. If either of you would gain more Stamina this way than their Stamina maximum, the difference in Stamina between what that creature would gain and their maximum is gained by the other creature. Neither of you can gain more Stamina than your maximum this way. You then make a power roll.
Power Roll + Presence:
- ≤11: You and the target can each end one effect on yourselves that is ended by a saving throw or that ends at the end of your turns.
- 12-16: You and the target can end any effects on yourselves that are ended by a saving throw or that end at the end of your turns.
- 17+: You can choose any of the current effects on you and the target that are ended by a saving throw or that end at the end of your turns, apply the chosen effects to the target, and end the rest.

features.name: 9th-Level Virtuoso Abilities
features.description:
Choose one of the following abilities.
Jam Session (11 Drama)
Your jam session creates new genres that compel everyone to get up and move.
[Area, Magic] Main action
Distance: 5 burst | Target: Each enemy in the area
Power Roll + Presence:
- ≤11: 8 sonic damage
- 12-16: 11 sonic damage
- 17+: 15 sonic damage
Effect: Each creature within distance gains a +5 bonus to speed until the end of their next turn. While under this effect, each target must use their full movement during their turn.
Melt Their Faces (11 Drama)
The power of music rips through the reality around the target and blows them away.
[Magic, Melee, Ranged, Strike] Main action
Distance: Melee 1 or ranged 10 | Target: One creature or object
Power Roll + Presence:
- ≤11: 12 + P sonic damage; push 5
- 12-16: 16 + P sonic damage; push 10
- 17+: 22 + P sonic damage; push 15
Effect: Forced movement from this ability ignores stability.

features.name: Roar of the Crowd
features.description:
You are empowered by your audience, near and far. You can't be made frightened, and if you are prone, you can stand up as a free maneuver.

Additionally, whenever you spend a Recovery, you can forgo regaining Stamina to invoke the roar of an invisible applauding audience. You and each ally within 3 squares of you gains temporary Stamina equal to 10 + the number of active bonds from your Scene Partner feature + either your Victories or the number of players in your game (whichever is higher).

features.name: Applause
features.description:
You have an epic resource called applause. Each time you finish a respite, you gain applause equal to the XP you gain. You can spend applause on your abilities as if it were drama.

Additionally, whenever you or a creature within 3 squares would obtain a failure or a tier 1 outcome on a test, you can spend 1 applause to improve the outcome by 1 tier.

Applause remains until you spend it.

features.name: Characteristic Increase
features.description: Your Agility and Presence scores each increase to 5.

features.name: Dramaturgy
features.description: You gain 1 additional drama or other Heroic Resource whenever you use your Appeal to the Muses feature. Additionally, your performances no longer have a distance, but can affect any target on the encounter map within your line of effect.

features.name: Greatest of All Time
features.description: Whenever you obtain a success on a test, each NPC within your line of effect has their Impression score decreased by 4 during a negotiation (to a minimum of 1), and each ally within 3 squares of you gains an edge on their next test. These effects last until you start your next respite.

features.name: Perk
features.description: You gain one interpersonal, lore, or supernatural perk of your choice.

features.name: Skill
features.description: You gain one skill of your choice.

resource_generation: Start of combat: Gain essence equal to your Victories.
+2 essence at the start of each of your turns (increases to +3 at 7th level via Font of Creation).
+1 essence the first time each combat round that any minion (yours or enemy) dies unwillingly within your Summoner's Range.

You can sacrifice one or more minions within your Summoner's Range when using a heroic ability or calling forth a minion to reduce the cost by 1 per minion sacrificed. Can't kill minions that used a main action or maneuver during the turn.
Essence is lost at end of encounter.
Outside of combat: You can use heroic abilities and essence-cost effects without spending essence, but can't reuse the same ability/effect until you gain a Victory or finish a respite.

features.name: Summoner Circle
features.description: Choose a summoner circle (subclass). Your circle determines your portfolio of minions and grants additional features.

subclass_effects.Blight: You are a demonologist who calls forth demons from the Abyssal Waste. Your portfolio includes shapechanging demons that grow in hunger and power over time. You can communicate with creatures that have the Abyssal keyword even if you don't share a language.
subclass_effects.Graves: You are a necromancer who raises undead creatures from the Necropolitan Ruin. The corporeal and incorporeal creatures under your command are hardy and many. You can communicate with creatures that have the Undead keyword even if you don't share a language.
subclass_effects.Spring: You are a feybright who beckons pixies, nixies, and sprites from Arcadia. Your portfolio features ephemeral fey spirits surrounded by weird and powerful magic. You can communicate with creatures that have the Fey keyword even if you don't share a language.
subclass_effects.Storms: You are a storm caster who summons elementals from Quintessence. This portfolio contains forces of nature that leave a big impact on the environment. You can communicate with creatures that have the Elemental keyword even if you don't share a language.

features.name: Minions
features.description: You can summon and maintain up to 8 minions (increases by 4 at 4th level). You can manage up to two squads. Your Summoner's Range is 5 + Reason. Start of combat: summon up to 2 signature minions at no cost. Start of each turn: summon up to 3 signature minions at no cost (4 with Horde Formation; +1 additional at 7th level). Minions act on your turn. Minions pool Stamina in squads. When a squad loses Stamina equal to a single member's value, one minion dies. If all minions in a squad die with excess damage, you take 2 + your level damage.

features.name: Summoner Strike
features.description: Replaces both your melee and ranged free strikes. Effect: R damage. If the target has r<w, they are slowed (save ends). Has the Charge keyword when used as a melee strike. At 3rd level (Summoner's Kit): damage increases to 2×R, potency increases to r<v, distance equals Summoner's Range. At 9th level (Kit Improvement): potency increases to r<s.

features.name: Strike for Me
features.description: Trigger: You use a triggered action to make a free strike or use a signature ability. Power Roll + Reason: 11-: Up to three targets each make a free strike; 12+: Up to five targets each make a free strike; 17+: Up to seven targets each make a free strike. On a natural 19 or 20, each target makes a free strike. Your minions act in place of you. If the triggered action was against a specific target, your minions must strike the same target. If granted a signature ability, you have an edge on the power roll.

features.name: Call Forth
features.description: Summon one or more minions from your portfolio into unoccupied spaces within distance. Signature Minions: summon one per essence spent. All Other Minions: summon the set number listed on the stat block for their essence cost.

features.name: Minion Bridge
features.description: Shift into a square adjacent to the target, including vertically. You can shift into squares containing your minions. Each time you shift into a minion's square, you can shift an additional square. 1 Essence: An adjacent ally can shift alongside you; they must end adjacent to the last minion you moved through.

features.name: Formation
features.description: Choose one formation (changeable via intense study during respite). Horde: Max minions +4; summon 4 signature minions at start of turn instead of 3. Platoon: Whenever a squad uses a damaging ability, choose one target to take additional damage equal to Reason. Elite: Each minion's Stamina +3 and stability +1. Leader: Not affected by excess damage when all minions in a squad die; if minion within Summoner's Range takes damage, you can take damage in place of the minion. Can use light armor and light weapon treasures without a kit.

features.name: Quick Command
features.description: Choose one quick command (changeable with formation via intense study during respite). Focus Fire!: Trigger: A target (self or one ally within Summoner's Range) deals damage to another creature. Effect: Target gains a surge for each of your minions adjacent to them (max 3), usable on the triggering damage. Spend 1 Essence: If damage is from a power roll ability, the power roll gains an edge. Halt!: Trigger: A target (one creature within Summoner's Range) starts their turn, moves, or is force moved. Effect: Summon a signature minion adjacent to the target. If force moved into the minion, you can negate collision damage. Special: Instead of summoning, you can command one of your minions within distance to shift up to their speed toward a square adjacent to the target. Not Yet!: Cost: 3 Essence. Trigger: A target (self or one ally within Summoner's Range) receives enough damage to die or be destroyed. Special: If a minion, they must be the only one remaining in their squad. Effect: Reduce damage to leave the target alive with 1 Stamina. Shield!: Trigger: A target (self or one ally within Summoner's Range) is targeted by a strike. Effect: If one of your minions is adjacent to the target and within distance of the strike, they become the new target. Spend 1 Essence: Instead of commanding an existing minion, summon a signature minion adjacent to the target to take the strike.

features.name: 1st-Level Circle Features
features.description: Your circle grants you features at 1st level.

subclass_effects.Blight: Death Snap: Whenever one of your demon minions would die unwillingly, they deal damage to an adjacent creature equal to their free strike value before dying. Soulsense: While you have line of effect to a creature with a soul, you can perceive a trail of where they have been in the last 5 x your level minutes. After a respite, you always perceive the soul trails of each creature that took the respite with you.
subclass_effects.Graves: Dead Men Tell All Tales: Touch a corpse (died within past week) and ask a question. They can answer; additional questions require a medium Reason test (failure breaks connection). Rise!: Once per round, when a creature dies unwillingly within Summoner's Range, use a triggered action to summon a signature undead minion in their space at no cost (even past max), if they can join a squad. Free triggered if the target was a minion.
subclass_effects.Spring: Fairy Whispers: When sending a minion on a task, they bring back a rumor. Make a Reason test for quality. Pixie Dust: +2 Recoveries. Whenever one of your fey minions dies within Summoner's Range, spend a Recovery to give temporary Stamina equal to 2x Reason to each non-minion ally adjacent to the dying minion.
subclass_effects.Storms: Elemental Affinity: When using Call Forth for non-signature elementals, summon one bonus signature minion at no cost (must share an Element keyword or be an elemental mote). Heart of Nature: Sense creatures with Elemental or Dragon keywords within 1 mile. Feel their emotions. Can't get below tier 2 on Intuition tests to socially interact with them.

features.name: Portfolio
features.description: Your portfolio comprises the minions you've learned to summon. At 1st level, choose signature minions and 3-essence minions from your circle's portfolio. Blight/Spring/Undead: Select two signature minions and two 3-essence minions. Storms: Gain elemental mote plus one signature minion, then two 3-essence minions. New portfolio minions are gained at 2nd level (5-essence), 5th level (7-essence), and 8th level (champion, 9-essence).

features.name: Summoner's Dominion
features.description: Once per encounter, summon a fixture from your minions' native manifold into an unoccupied ground space within Summoner's Range. Spend 1 essence to relocate it as a free maneuver. Stays until end of encounter, reduced to 0 Stamina, or you become dying. Fixture gains features at 5th and 9th level.

subclass_effects.Blight: The Boil (Hazard Support, Stamina 20+level, Size 2): Hunger Thrush: Each enemy starting turn within 3 squares is i<v taunted (EoT), or i<w taunted and can't move further. Oh, It Pops: When destroyed, enemies within 3 take acid damage = level and are a<s weakened (save ends). Level 5: Soul Rancor - gain surge when demons deal 3+ damage to a creature while you have line of effect. Level 9: Size 3, Fester Field - non-abyssal enemies within 3 take 5 corruption at start of turn.
subclass_effects.Graves: Barrow Gates (Fortification Defender, Stamina 20+level, Size 2): The Bell Tolls: Enemies starting turn within 3 are i<v frightened (EoT), +1 potency for winded enemies. Undead Dominion: Undead minions have damage immunity 2 within 3 squares. Level 5: Memento Mori - surge when undead minion unwillingly dies with line of effect. Level 9: Size 3, Open the Gates - use Rise! as free triggered when enemy dies within 3 squares.
subclass_effects.Spring: Glade Pond (Hazard Ambusher, Stamina 20+level, Size 2): Bubbling Boost: Non-minion allies entering or starting turn within 3 get +2 speed until end of turn. Overgrowth: Fey minions ending turn within 3 are hidden until start of next turn. Level 5: Garden of Jest - spend Recovery when creature gains/starts turn with condition. Level 9: Size 3, Folly Field - non-fey enemies within 3 get -1 saving throws.
subclass_effects.Storms: Primordial Crystal (Relic Artillery, Stamina 20+level, Size 2): Magnetic Pull: Enemies starting turn within 3 are vertically pulled 3. Elemental Boost: Ranged abilities drawing line through crystal get +5 distance. Level 5: Terra Resonance - surge when area gains supernatural terrain effect. Level 9: Size 3, Magnified Strike - ranged strikes through crystal grant surge.

features.name: Summoner's Kit
features.description: You conjure a kit with an implement. Summoner Strike damage increases to 2x Reason, potency increases to r<v, and distance equals Summoner's Range. Choose one ward (changeable via ritual during respite): Conjured Ward (+3 Stamina, increases by 3 at 4th/7th/10th), Emergency Ward (first time each round you take damage, shift 1 and summon a signature minion in the square you left), Howling Ward (1-aura dealing Reason damage to adjacent enemies at start of their turn), Snare Ward (when adjacent creature damages you, pull them toward one of your minions within Summoner's Range a number of squares equal to Reason).

features.name: Essence Salvage
features.description: The first time each combat round that any minion unwillingly dies within your Summoner's Range, you gain 2 essence instead of 1.

features.name: Minion Chain
features.description: When using Minion Bridge, each of your minions within Summoner's Range can shift up to their speed before the maneuver takes effect, as long as each shifting minion ends adjacent to another of your minions. Minions can also chain to form a ladder or swinging rope.

features.name: 5th-Level Circle Feature
features.description: Your circle grants you features at 5th level.

subclass_effects.Blight: Shaping: Spend 1 minute to disguise a minion as a duplicate of you (basic Caelian speech). Up to Reason minions disguised at once. Soul Flense: As a maneuver, command demon minions to each deal free strike damage to an adjacent ally (can't be reduced). The ally ends a condition and confers it to the attacking demon. Additionally, Death Snaps can inflict conditions the minion was suffering from.
subclass_effects.Graves: Channel: Spend 1 minute to host a willing spirit of a recently deceased creature. Access their memories (24 hours before death) and skills. Can change appearance to look like them. Stopping requires medium Presence test if hostile or hosted 1+ hour; failure = possessed by a haunt. Dread March: You and undead minions ignore difficult terrain speed cost. Undead minions that would die during move action can choose to not die until end of your turn.
subclass_effects.Spring: Flash Powder: When allies gain temporary Stamina from Pixie Dust, they also gain one effect until end of next turn (or 10 min out of combat): Flight (Fly), Vanish (invisible), Water Weird (teleport to water within 5 as free maneuver once/turn), or Panacea (end one condition or stand up). Pixie Lift: Your speed gains Fly and Hover (lose Hover while dazed, dying, or more than 1 square above ground).
subclass_effects.Storms: Nature Watch: Spend 1 minute to summon a beacon elemental mote to patrol. It telepathically communicates hostile creatures, hazards, or traps within 20 squares. You know direction but not exact position. Up to level beacons active. Split: Once per turn, free maneuver to deal half max Stamina to an elemental minion to create a copy in adjacent space (added to squad, even past max). Can't use if it would kill a squad member.

features.name: Return to the Source
features.description: When you take a respite, you teleport to your circle's source manifold (Blight: Abyssal Waste, Graves: Necropolitan Ruins, Spring: Arcadia, Storms: Quintessence). You can bring allies. You are seen as a native resident. You teleport back at the end of the respite.

features.name: Minion Machinations
features.description: Your maximum number of followers increases by 2. You can summon and recruit an artisan follower and a sage follower that share a keyword with a minion you can summon.

features.name: Kit Improvement (6th)
features.description: Choose one additional ward from Summoner's Kit. Whenever you reduce an enemy to 0 Stamina with Summoner Strike, you can use Call Forth as a free maneuver (summoned minions can't act this turn).

features.name: Font of Creation
features.description: When you gain essence at the start of each of your turns during combat, you gain 3 essence instead of 2.

features.name: Their Life for Mine
features.description: If you or an ally within Summoner's Range would die from a non-age-related effect, sacrifice all your active minions (minimum 1) and spend all your essence (minimum 1). The target comes back to life with 0 Stamina plus 1 per minion and essence used. Must have at least one fragment of the creature's remains, and the creature's soul must be willing to return. Can't use again until you gain a new level or spend 3 eidos.

features.name: 8th-Level Circle Feature
features.description: Your circle grants you features at 8th level.

subclass_effects.Blight: Abyssal Evolution: At the start of each turn, transform up to two demon minions within Summoner's Range. From round 2, a demon can transform into any demon minion you can call forth for half the essence cost.
subclass_effects.Graves: Kill the Pain: Not affected by excess damage when all minions in a squad die. You and undead minions ignore d3/d6 damage and environmental damage while you are not winded.
subclass_effects.Spring: Celestial Grace: +2 more Recoveries. Pixie Dust area and fey minion traits affecting adjacent/within 1+ squares increase that distance by 1.
subclass_effects.Storms: Control the Elements: When using Call Forth, spend essence to change elemental minion size. 1 essence = size 2, 3 essence = size 3, 5 essence = size 4.

features.name: Portfolio Champion
features.description: Add a champion to your portfolio (9 essence). Champions follow minion rules with exceptions: only one instance, own squad (doesn't count toward max squads), can regain Stamina and gain temporary Stamina, use your Recoveries, can Heal and Defend, use normal maneuver rules. You have an edge on Champion keyword abilities from the champion's space. After summoning, can't summon again until you earn a Victory. At 10th level, champion gains a Champion Action (1 eidos, once per encounter, at end of any creature's turn).

subclass_effects.Blight: Demon Lord's Aspect (Size 2, Speed 5, Stamina = your max, Stability 2, Free Strike 9, Teleport, Corruption damage). Grasping Appendages signature (Melee 5, two targets, pull + grab). Warping Strike (free strikes teleport target 5). Champion's Ire (+Reason damage on single target). I Like Your Taste (free triggered: double edge on next power roll when taking damage). Frenzy (free strike each adjacent enemy when reduced to 0). Level 10: Size 3, Reality Flense (1 eidos: allies teleport speed and make free strike, can pass save-ends conditions).
subclass_effects.Graves: Avatar of Death (Size 2, Speed 6, Stamina = your max, Stability 3, Free Strike 9, Fly, Holy damage). Culling Scythe signature (Melee 2, two targets, bleeding save ends; creatures still bleeding at end of encounter instantly die). Revelation Strike (free strikes instantly reduce winded non-leader/solo to 0). Champion's Ire. Dust and Rot (free triggered 1 burst: m<v weakened EoT). Drifting Spirit (unaffected by difficult terrain and forced movement damage). Level 10: Size 3, Gravemaker (1 eidos: 5x3 line, 9 holy damage, vertical pull into ground).
subclass_effects.Spring: Celestial Attendant (Size 2, Speed 7, Stamina = your max, Stability 0, Free Strike 9, Fly/Hover, Poison damage). Pixie Swarm signature (Ranged 10, two targets, slide 3/5/6; ally targeted can spend Recovery and shift instead). Neurotoxic Strike (free strikes: i<v can't establish line of effect beyond 3 EoT). Champion's Ire. Celestial Bell (free triggered: summon signature adjacent when taking damage). Pixie Bouquet (temp Stamina = 2x fey minions within 1 at start of turn). Level 10: Size 3, A Shower of Dust (1 eidos: 20 burst, allies gain 20 temp Stamina + Flash Powder effect).
subclass_effects.Storms: Dragon's Portent (Size 2, Speed 6, Stamina = your max, Stability 4, Free Strike 9, Fly, Affinity damage - choose acid/cold/corruption/fire/lightning/poison on summon). Elemental Tail Swing signature (Charge, Melee 2, two targets, push 2/4/6). Sealing Strike (free strikes: m<s slowed save ends + 1d6 affinity damage/turn). Champion's Ire. Searing Wyrmscale (adjacent creatures dealing damage take 4 affinity). Dragon Heart (once/turn, take 10 unreducible damage to give ally 1 heroic resource). Level 10: Size 3, A Breath Felt in a Hurricane (1 eidos: 4 cube within 10, 9 affinity damage ignoring immunity, area = difficult terrain + weakness 5).

features.name: Kit Improvement (9th)
features.description: Summoner Strike potency increases to r<s. Choose one additional ward. Double edge on tests to dissuade or scare enemy minions/lackeys. Clothing and equipment become adorned with elaborate regalia.

features.name: Steward of Two Worlds
features.description: You and your allies are welcome in your circle's source manifold. Negotiations with native denizens have patience increased by 2.

features.name: Eidos
features.description: You gain an epic resource called eidos. When you take a respite, gain eidos equal to XP gained. You can spend eidos as essence on minions and abilities. When you do, summon up to two bonus signature minions. You and your champion also access Champion Action abilities (1 eidos, once per encounter). Eidos remains until spent.

features.name: No Matter the Cost
features.description: When you sacrifice minions, you reduce the cost of a heroic ability or minion by the same amount (to a minimum of 1) instead of only reducing by 1 per sacrifice.

features.name: Among Our Ranks
features.description: As a respite activity, summon a willing and not-restrained NPC or player ally to join your party, regardless of distance or manifold. They stay until the start of your next respite or until killed (immediately dismissed back). Only one character summoned this way at a time.
